name: Pull the String
author: Poki
description: Get ready for puzzles and pranks in Pull the String! Keep the master of pranks Nick out of trouble as he sets on a quest to impress Tani, and claim a vast fortune of gold. This game tests your strategy as you have to pull the correct pins to trick the Teacher and avoid the dangerous traps she has installed. Did you pick the wrong solution? Then don't worry, you can easily replay the levels. Can you outsmart the Scary Teacher and claim your golden treasure? How do I play Pull the String? Click on the pins in the correct order to find the solution! Who created Pull the String? Pull the String is created by ZnK Games. Play their other games on Poki: Hide and Seek and School Escape! ! How can I play Pull the String for free? You can play Pull the String for free on Poki. Can I play Pull the String on mobile devices and desktop? Pull the String can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
